name: gitquest
description: GitQuest - interactive Git internals and GitHub activity visualizer

scripts.dev: scripts/with-node22.sh concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: scripts/with-node22.sh sh -c 'cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install'
scripts.render-build: cd client && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../server && npm ci --omit=dev
